examples: A motorboat nosed out of the mist and nudged into the branches of a tree.
The motorboat cut across swift currents and skirted dangerous reefs.
A gasoline engine drives the motorboat.
We docked the motorboat and I climbed into the makoro, the sides snug around me.
Briney corrals herds of carp into a line of seven 100-yard-wide nets using his 300hp outboard motorboat.
